title: Stellarity RP 汉化版
description:
Stellarity资源包的汉化版! 
Stellarity RP's Chinese version!
body:
---

### **Stellarity资源包汉化版**
**本汉化包仅适用于中文用户。**


**简介：**
- **功能描述**：本资源包为[Stellarity Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity)提供汉化支持，包括物品名称、物品简介、成就、生物群系名称等内容的翻译，帮助中文用户更好地理解和使用该Mod。
- **下载理由**：如果你是中文用户，且希望在使用Stellarity Mod时获得更清晰的指引和更便捷的体验，这个汉化包将是一个不错的选择。
- **注意事项**：本汉化包仅适用于Stellarity Mod，不包含Mod本身的功能。建议在下载前确保已安装Stellarity Mod。

**汉化内容：**
- 物品名称
- 物品简介
- 成就
- 生物群系名称

**反馈渠道：**
如果在使用汉化包过程中遇到任何问题，欢迎通过Bobby的邮箱 [bobby_minecraft@qq.com](mailto:bobby_minecraft@qq.com) 提供反馈。

**感谢使用！**

---

### **Stellarity Resource Pack Chinese Version**
**This localization pack is specifically designed for Chinese users.**

**Introduction:**
- **Function Description**: This resource pack provides Chinese localization support for the [Stellarity Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity), including translations of item names, item descriptions, achievements, and biome names, helping Chinese users better understand and use the Mod.
- **Reason to Download**: If you are a Chinese user and want clearer guidance and a more convenient experience while using the Stellarity Mod, this localization pack will be a good choice.
- **Notes**: This localization pack is only applicable to the Stellarity Mod and does not include the Mod's own functions. It is recommended to ensure that the Stellarity Mod is installed before downloading.

**Localization Content:**
- Item Names
- Item Descriptions
- Achievements
- Biome Names

**Feedback Channel:**
If you encounter any problems while using the localization pack, please feel free to provide feedback via Bobby's email [bobby_minecraft@qq.com](mailto:bobby_minecraft@qq.com).

**Thank you for using!**

---
